_comment: ONS direct-debit failure rate (headline Total NSA, % of attempted DD transactions). Sourced from the ONS 'Monthly Direct Debit failure rate and average transaction amount' xlsx — sheet '2.DD Failure Rates Total NSA' (in the 2026 edition a 'Total SA' sheet was inserted as sheet 1, shifting Total NSA to sheet 2). Shipping May 2026 = 2.34% (Total NSA), the most recent month in the 18 June 2026 edition (directdebittransactionsandfailuresdataset180626.xlsx; June 2026 data not yet published). Series tail for reference: Mar 2026 = 2.41%, Apr 2026 = 2.34%, May 2026 = 2.34%. See dd-failure-rate-history.json for the full curated back-series. TODO(source): wire in the ONS xlsx parser — the dataset has a stable URL and clean monthly schema.
